NAVAREA XIX 37/16

ANDOYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT A NUMBER OF ROCKET FIRINGS DAILY BETWEEN 1600 AND 2200 UTC FROM 11 MAY TO 14 MAY
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA.

A. 69-01.8N 015-29.7E
B. 69-03.5N 014-32.0E
C. 69-29.0N 014-32.0E
D. 69-29.0N 015-45.5E
E. 69-11.6N 015-49.6E
F. 69-01.8N 015-29.7E

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 08/16
